name: lib-skill
description: MyLibrary vault entity-first skill system for settle, entity, search, review, compile, export, and manual workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Entity-first workflows for the MyLibrary vault.
interface.longDescription: Skills for settling work logs, managing entity pages, searching vault context, generating reviews, compiling folder config, exporting sessions, and reading the MyLibrary vault manual.
defaultPrompt: Use lib-manual to orient me in MyLibrary.
